sections.heading: Acknowledgment of Service and Company Status
sections.content: Gulf Coast IV Concierge LLC acts as an administrative and technology facilitator that connects clients with licensed medical professionals[cite: 45]. By using our services, you acknowledge that clinical care is provided by independent licensed practitioners and not by the business entity itself[cite: 12]. All clinical decisions and treatment plans are governed by our Medical Director as required by F.S. § 400.9935[cite: 18].

sections.heading: Non-Emergency Agreement
sections.content: OUR SERVICES ARE NOT FOR MEDICAL EMERGENCIES. If you are experiencing chest pain, difficulty breathing, severe trauma, or any life-threatening condition, you must immediately call 911 or proceed to the nearest emergency room[cite: 44]. We do not provide acute emergency interventions[cite: 44].

sections.heading: Medical Disclaimers and FDA Compliance
sections.content: IV therapy is provided for elective wellness and nutritional support[cite: 46]. You acknowledge that our IV fluids, vitamins, and customized infusions have not been evaluated by the FDA for the prevention, treatment, or cure of specific diseases[cite: 46]. Our services are not a substitute for regular primary care or specialist medical consultations[cite: 46].

sections.heading: Establishment of Treatment Relationship
sections.content: To comply with Florida Board of Medicine standards, a 'Good Faith Exam' (GFE) must be conducted via synchronous video telehealth before any treatment is initiated[cite: 24, 26]. You agree to provide a full and accurate medical history, including all current medications and allergies, during this clinical encounter[cite: 27]. We cannot establish a treatment relationship through audio-only phone calls or online forms alone[cite: 29].

sections.heading: Mobile Service Logistics and Entry
sections.content: We provide services in private residences, offices, and hotels across the Florida Gulf Coast, specifically Naples, Marco Island, Sanibel & Captiva, and Bonita Springs[cite: 3, 53]. You agree to provide a safe, sanitary, and well-lit environment for our nursing staff[cite: 38]. We reserve the right to perform a 'Second Screening' at the door and may refuse service if contagious illnesses are present or if the treatment environment is deemed unsafe[cite: 39].

sections.heading: Cancellation and Refund Policy
sections.content: Due to the specialized nature of mobile medical dispatch and the sterile compounding of IV solutions, we maintain a strict cancellation policy[cite: 51]. Once a practitioner has been dispatched or a custom IV bag has been prepared, fees are non-refundable[cite: 51].

sections.heading: No Insurance and Payment
sections.content: Gulf Coast IV Concierge LLC is a cash-only wellness service[cite: 8, 48]. We do not accept or bill any third-party insurance carriers, Medicare, or Medicaid[cite: 48]. By booking a service, you accept sole financial responsibility for the direct cost of treatment[cite: 48].

sections.heading: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
sections.content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Florida[cite: 3]. Any legal actions or disputes arising from our services shall be resolved through binding arbitration in the South Florida jurisdiction where the company's principal place of business is located[cite: 79].
